description_long: This object is a streamlined airplane with a sleek, elongated fuselage painted in a gradient of light blue and white. It features a pair of straight, mid-mounted wings with slight upward angles at the tips, and a single propeller engine mounted at the rear of the fuselage. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, all in a matching color scheme. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a series of dark, rectangular windows forming a canopy. The airplane's surface appears smooth and metallic, with minimal visible seams or rivets, and no landing gear is visible in the images.
description: A sleek, light blue and white airplane with mid-mounted straight wings, a rear propeller, and a front cockpit with dark windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated fuselage, mid-mounted wings, rear propeller, and vertical tail fin.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit windows, and the full wingspan with upward-angled tips.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the propeller and tail configuration from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the single rear propeller, tail assembly, and the symmetrical wing structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings featuring slight upward-angled (dihedral) tips and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted propeller engine (turboprop or piston).
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-window canopy at the front of the fuselage.
